description: Required root/header containers and metadata must be present with parseable shape.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md JSON Data Attributes; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json root required; archive v2 schemas root required; documentation/CSV/README.md General Data Elements
fields: hospital_name; last_updated_on; version; location_name; hospital_location; hospital_address; license_information; attestation; affirmation; type_2_npi; standard_charge_information
condition: Root/header fields needed for file metadata and charge parsing are missing or wrong container type.
notes: Structural header coverage is inferred from Bronze snapshot and child-row evidence because the streaming parser does not instantiate the full root object.

description: Attestation object must carry statement text; confirmation boolean; and v3 attester name.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Attestation Object; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.attestation.required; archive v2 schemas definitions.affirmation.required
condition: Attestation or affirmation object is present but required child fields are absent.
notes: Structural for root model. v2 uses affirmation; v3 uses attestation.

description: License information must include a state attribute or CSV state header suffix.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.license_information.required; documentation/CSV/state_codes.md
condition: License state is missing.
notes: Structural presence; state format and membership are separate semantic rules.

description: Each charge item must have description; code_information array; and standard_charges array.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Standard Charge Information Object; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.standard_charge_information.required
condition: A JSON standard_charge_information item lacks a required structural child.
notes: Structural. Missing arrays prevent Bronze fanout.

description: Header-declared schema version should agree with the record's detected shape.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md JSON Data Attributes; CMS JSON schema versioned layouts
condition: Accepted JSON charge item parsed under a different schema family or version than the header declared.
notes: Diagnostic promoted to a warning validation rule. Warn severity keeps the charge item in Silver while surfacing the disagreement for review.

description: Each code object must include code and type fields.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.code_information.required; documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirements 2 and 3
condition: A code row/object has one side of the code pair missing.
notes: Structural for JSON; semantic completeness for CSV where rows may still reach Bronze.

description: If drug_information is present it must include unit and type.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Drug Information Object; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.drug_information.required
condition: Optional drug object exists but unit or type is missing.
notes: Structural when JSON object exists. NDC conditional requirement is separate.

description: Each standard charge must include setting.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Standard Charge Object; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.standard_charges.required; documentation/CSV/README.md Required Standard Charge table
condition: Standard charge setting is missing.
notes: Structural presence. Accepted values are handled by setting_allowed_values.

description: Modifier objects and modifier payer objects must include required scalar fields and payer rows.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.modifier_information.required; definitions.modifier_payer_information.required
fields: modifier_information.description; modifier_information.code; modifier_payer_information; modifier_payer_information.payer_name; modifier_payer_information.plan_name; modifier_payer_information.description
condition: JSON modifier dimension is present but lacks required structure.
notes: Structural for optional JSON modifier pass.

description: General contract provision objects must include provisions text.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md General Contract Provisions Object; documentation/CSV/README.md Optional Column Headers
condition: General contract provisions object is present but provisions is missing.
notes: Parser emits source-faithful general_contract_provisions Bronze rows (JSON array objects; flat CSV column), so val__header_violations flags missing/blank provisions at the file grain.

description: JSON last_updated_on must be ISO date shaped; CSV accepts ISO plus documented slash formats.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md JSON Data Attributes; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json root last_updated_on.format; documentation/CSV/README.md Additional Notes for MRF Date
condition: MRF date is not in an accepted source-format-specific date format.
notes: Checks source-format-specific string shape only; calendar-invalid dates that match an accepted pattern are not rejected.

description: Each Type 2 NPI must be a ten-digit numeric identifier.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Type 2 Organizational NPI; documentation/CSV/README.md Type 2 Organizational NPI; no direct JSON schema basis for ten-digit check
condition: Any NPI token is not exactly ten digits.
notes: Semantic app invariant from NPI identifier format.

description: License state must be two alphabetic characters.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Hospital Licensure Object; documentation/CSV/state_codes.md
condition: State value is not two alphabetic characters after trimming.
notes: Checks the trimmed source value shape; membership in the CMS state and territory list is evaluated by state_valid_usps_code.

description: License state must be in the CMS state and territory abbreviation list.
cms_citation: documentation/CSV/state_codes.md; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.license_information.properties.state.enum
condition: State value is two letters but not in the CMS state/territory list.
notes: Membership is evaluated against the states seed after uppercasing a two-letter source value.

description: If any code type is NDC then drug unit and drug type must be encoded.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Conditional Requirements 8; archive/documentation/JSON/v2.2_README.md Conditional Requirements; documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirement 10
fields: code_information.type; drug_information.unit; drug_information.type; code\|[i]\|type; drug_unit_of_measurement; drug_type_of_measurement
condition: Any code type is NDC and drug unit or drug type is absent.
notes: Applies to schema families 2.2 and 3.0; family 2.1 is excluded because it does not define drug information.

description: Code type must be in the CMS code type list.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Additional Notes Concerning Code Types; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.code_information.properties.type.enum; documentation/CSV/README.md code type table
condition: Code type is not one of the project-wide CMS code type values.
notes: Global membership is driven by cms_code_types; exact schema-family applicability is evaluated separately by code_type_family_specific_enum.

description: Code type should respect the exact enum for the reported schema family.
cms_citation: archive/documentation/JSON/schemas/V2.1.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json code enum; archive/documentation/JSON/schemas/V2.2.1_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json code enum; v3 schema code enum
condition: Code type is valid in the global superset but not valid for the reported schema family.
notes: Uses the reported schema family and cms_code_types valid_in_* flags after the code type passes global membership.

description: Drug unit must be parseable as a number.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Drug Information Object; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.drug_information.properties.unit.type; documentation/CSV/README.md drug unit type
condition: Non-empty drug unit cannot be cast to numeric.
notes: Numeric parseability is enforced for family 3.0, including CSV; family 2.2 defines drug unit as a string.

description: Drug unit must be greater than zero when present.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md General JSON Instructions; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json exclusiveMinimum: 0; documentation/CSV/README.md General CSV Instructions
condition: Parsed drug unit is zero or negative.
notes: Semantic value rule.

description: Drug measurement type must be one of the CMS/NCPDP values.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Additional Notes for Drug Type Of Measurement Values; documentation/CSV/README.md Additional Notes for Drug Type Of Measurement Values
condition: Drug type is outside GR; ME; ML; UN; F2; EA; GM.
notes: Semantic accepted-value rule.

description: Standard charge numeric fields must be parseable as numbers.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Standard Charge Object numeric types; documentation/CSV/README.md standard charge numeric columns
fields: minimum; maximum; gross_charge; discounted_cash; standard_charge\|min; standard_charge\|max; standard_charge\|gross; standard_charge\|discounted_cash
condition: Non-empty standard charge numeric value cannot be cast to numeric.
notes: Raw values remain in Bronze; validation uses safe decimal casts and emits numeric_cast_failed consistently for JSON and CSV.

description: Standard charge numeric fields must be greater than zero when present.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md General JSON Instructions; v2/v3 schemas exclusiveMinimum: 0; documentation/CSV/README.md General CSV Instructions
fields: minimum; maximum; gross_charge; discounted_cash; standard_charge\|min; standard_charge\|max; standard_charge\|gross; standard_charge\|discounted_cash
condition: Parsed standard charge numeric value is zero or negative.
notes: Semantic value rule.

description: Setting must be inpatient; outpatient; or both.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Standard Charge Object and Modifier Information Object; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json setting enums; documentation/CSV/README.md setting column
condition: Setting value is outside the CMS setting enum.
notes: Applies to standard-charge settings; modifier settings are evaluated separately by modifier_setting_allowed_values.

description: Each item/service must have gross; discounted cash; or payer-specific negotiated charge data.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Conditional Requirement 2; archive/documentation/JSON/v2.2_README.md Conditional Requirements; archive/documentation/JSON/v2.1_README.md Conditional Requirements; documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirement 5
fields: gross_charge; discounted_cash; standard_charge_dollar; standard_charge_percentage; standard_charge_algorithm; CSV charge value columns
condition: A charge item has none of the required standard charge value fields.
notes: Semantic conditional rule.

description: If payer-specific negotiated dollar is encoded then min and max must be encoded.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Conditional Requirement 4; v2/v3 JSON schemas then.required minimum maximum; documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirement 6
fields: standard_charge_dollar; minimum; maximum; standard_charge\|negotiated_dollar; standard_charge\|min; standard_charge\|max
condition: Payer dollar exists and parent min or max is missing.
notes: Semantic conditional rule.

description: If count is zero for percentage or algorithm then an explanatory note is required.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Conditional Requirement 7; documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirement 9; v3 JSON schema payer allOf count zero branch
condition: Percentage or algorithm rate has count 0 and lacks payer or generic notes.
notes: Accepts either payer-specific or generic explanatory notes for associated family 3.0 percentage or algorithm rates.

description: Payer rate objects must include payer name; plan name; and methodology.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Payers Information Object; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.payers_information.required
condition: A JSON payer object is present without payer name; plan name; or methodology.
notes: JSON-only: every payers_information object is inherently a rate and requires identity and methodology. CSV CR1 is bidirectional and conditional and is covered by csv_payer_identity_required_with_rate and csv_payer_rate_required_with_identity.

description: Payer amount and percentage fields must be parseable as numbers.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Payers Information Object numeric fields; archive/documentation/JSON/v2.2_README.md estimated_amount; documentation/CSV/README.md payer numeric columns
fields: standard_charge_dollar; standard_charge_percentage; estimated_amount; median_amount; 10th_percentile; 90th_percentile; CSV equivalents
condition: Non-empty payer numeric value cannot be cast to numeric.
notes: Semantic value rule. estimated_amount applies to older JSON families.

description: Payer numeric fields must be greater than zero when present.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md General JSON Instructions; v2/v3 schemas exclusiveMinimum: 0; documentation/CSV/README.md General CSV Instructions
fields: standard_charge_dollar; standard_charge_percentage; estimated_amount; median_amount; 10th_percentile; 90th_percentile; CSV equivalents
condition: Parsed payer numeric value is zero or negative.
notes: Semantic value rule.

description: Methodology must be one of the CMS contract methodology values.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Additional Standard Charge Methodology Notes; archive/documentation/JSON/v2.2_README.md methodology notes; documentation/CSV/README.md Additional Standard Charge Methodology Notes
condition: Methodology is outside case rate; fee schedule; percent of total billed charges; per diem; other.
notes: Semantic accepted-value rule.

description: Each payer information object must include at least one payer-specific charge value.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Conditional Requirement 3; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json payer allOf.anyOf
condition: A JSON payer object lacks dollar; percentage; and algorithm values.
notes: JSON-only (JSON CR3): a payers_information object must encode at least one negotiated charge. CSV item-only rows are governed by charge_requires_any_standard_charge_value (CR5); the CSV CR1 converse is covered by csv_payer_rate_required_with_identity.

description: Methodology other requires explanatory notes.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Conditional Requirement 1; archive/documentation/JSON/v2.2_README.md Conditional Requirements; documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirement 4
condition: Methodology is other and associated notes are blank.
notes: Accepts either payer-specific or generic explanatory notes; this is more permissive than the JSON guidance that specifically describes Additional Payer Notes.

description: In family 2.2 percentage or algorithm without dollar requires estimated_amount.
cms_citation: archive/documentation/JSON/v2.2_README.md Additional Notes for percentage; archive/documentation/JSON/schemas/V2.2.1_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json payer conditional estimated_amount
condition: Percentage or algorithm exists; dollar is absent; estimated_amount is absent.
notes: Semantic family-specific rule.

description: In family 3.0 percentage or algorithm without a usable dollar requires count.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Conditional Requirement 5; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json payer count conditional; documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirement 7
condition: Percentage or algorithm exists, count is absent, and no usable dollar is present.
notes: Excludes only when no usable dollar is present; dollar-bearing rows are retained and flagged by v3_algorithm_with_dollar_missing_count.

description: In family 3.0 a percentage or algorithm rate that omits count but carries a usable dollar is retained and flagged rather than excluded.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Conditional Requirement 5; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json payer count conditional; documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirement 7
condition: Percentage or algorithm exists and count is absent but a usable dollar is present.
notes: Non-excluding CR7 flag: a comparable dollar makes the row usable, so it stays in Silver and the count omission is recorded for audit. The excluding rule v3_percentage_or_algorithm_requires_count covers the no-dollar case.

description: In family 3.0 percentage or algorithm with nonzero count requires median; 10th percentile; and 90th percentile amounts.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Conditional Requirement 6; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json payer allowed amount conditional; documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirement 8
condition: Percentage or algorithm exists; count is not 0; any required allowed amount is absent.
notes: Semantic family-specific rule.

description: Count must be 0; 1 through 10; or whole number 11 or greater without thousands separators.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Count of Allowed Amounts and Additional Notes; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json count.pattern; documentation/CSV/README.md Additional Notes for Count
condition: Non-empty count value is outside the allowed string pattern.
notes: Validates the preserved trimmed source text against 0, 1 through 10, or an unseparated whole number of 11 or greater.

description: Attestation or affirmation text must match the CMS-required statement.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json attestation const; archive v2 schemas affirmation const; documentation/CSV/README.md Additional Notes for Attestation Statement
condition: Attestation text is present but not the CMS-required statement for the schema family.
notes: Compares the schema-family-specific CMS statement after trimming and collapsing whitespace, so whitespace-only differences are accepted.

description: Confirmation must be true to meet the regulatory attestation requirement.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Attestation Statement; documentation/CSV/README.md Additional Notes for Attestation Statement
condition: Attestation confirmation is false or not truthy.
notes: Treats true, 1, and yes case-insensitively as truthy; this is more permissive than requiring a literal boolean true.

description: Required string fields must not be empty after trimming.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json string minLength: 1; v2 schemas string minLength: 1; documentation/CSV/README.md blanks accepted No fields
condition: Required text field is blank or whitespace only.
notes: Checks non-null blank values for hospital_name, last_updated_on, version, and license state; missing values are reported by required-shape rules.

description: Required arrays must have at least one item.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json arrays minItems: 1; v2 schemas arrays minItems: 1
condition: Required array is present but empty.
notes: Infers empty JSON code_information and standard_charges arrays from accepted charge items with no corresponding Bronze child rows.

description: CSV code and code type must be encoded as a pair when either is present; standard charges require a corresponding code pair.
cms_citation: documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirements 2 and 3
condition: CSV row has code without type; type without code; or charge data with no code pair.
notes: Covers CSV charge rows with no code pair; incomplete code/type pairs are reported separately by code_information_required_shape.

description: CSV payer-specific rates require corresponding payer name; plan name; and methodology.
cms_citation: documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirement 1
fields: payer_name; plan_name; negotiated charge columns; methodology columns; wide payer/plan placeholders
condition: CSV payer charge exists without payer identity or methodology.
notes: CR1 forward direction: applies only to CSV rows with payer-specific rate values.

description: CSV rows with payer or plan identity require at least one payer-specific negotiated charge value.
cms_citation: documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirement 1
condition: CSV payer or plan identity is encoded without any payer-specific negotiated charge value.
notes: CR1 converse direction: applies to CSV rows where payer or plan name is encoded but no dollar; percentage; or algorithm charge is present. The CSV Wide parser does not materialize empty payer blocks (it emits a payer row only when the source encodes a payer-specific value for that item/payer), so this rule is uniform across Tall and Wide and does not fire on absent (item x payer) cells.

description: CSV placeholder tokens must be replaced with concrete state; index; payer name; and plan name values.
cms_citation: documentation/CSV/README.md Additional CSV Placeholder Notes
condition: CSV header still contains an unresolved placeholder or invalid placeholder value.
notes: Currently detects bracketed placeholders only in parsed CSV license-number and attestation header values; row-3 code and payer header placeholders are not retained for validation.

description: Modifier encoded without item/service requires description plus at least one charge or note field.
cms_citation: documentation/CSV/README.md Conditional Requirement 11
fields: modifiers; description; negotiated charge columns; additional_generic_notes; additional_payer_notes
condition: CSV modifier-only row lacks the minimum required accompanying fields.
notes: Currently emits only when both description and all qualifying charge/note fields are absent; CMS requires description and at least one qualifying field.

description: Optional billing_class should be professional; facility; or both.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Optional Data Attributes; documentation/CSV/README.md Optional Column Headers
condition: Optional billing_class is populated outside the documented values.
notes: Warn-only because CMS documents professional, facility, and both as recommended rather than required values.

description: Charge-item descriptions must not be empty after trimming.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json string minLength: 1; v2 schemas string minLength: 1; documentation/CSV/README.md blanks accepted No fields
condition: Required text field is blank or whitespace only.
notes: Checks non-null blank descriptions on accepted JSON and CSV charge items; structurally missing JSON descriptions may be quarantined before Bronze.

description: Code and code type values must not be empty after trimming.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json string minLength: 1; v2 schemas string minLength: 1; documentation/CSV/README.md blanks accepted No fields
condition: Required text field is blank or whitespace only.
notes: Checks non-null blank code and type values; missing members of a code/type pair are reported by required-shape rules.

description: Modifier payer information must include payer name, plan name, and description.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.modifier_information.required; definitions.modifier_payer_information.required
condition: JSON modifier dimension is present but lacks required structure.
notes: Structural for optional JSON modifier pass.

description: Modifier setting must be inpatient, outpatient, or both when present.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Standard Charge Object and Modifier Information Object; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json setting enums; documentation/CSV/README.md setting column
condition: Setting value is outside the CMS setting enum.
notes: Applies to JSON modifier settings; standard-charge settings are evaluated separately by setting_allowed_values.

description: A JSON record failed structural parsing and was quarantined before Bronze row construction.
cms_citation: documentation/JSON/README.md Standard Charge Information Object; documentation/JSON/schemas/V3.0.0_Hospital_price_transparency_schema.json definitions.standard_charge_information.required
condition: A JSON standard_charge_information item lacks a required structural child.
notes: Structural. Missing arrays prevent Bronze fanout.
